unseen_claim_text: True unseen-area generalization claim is locked to support-governed evidence only: 8/8 evaluated splits satisfy the minimum support policy (test positives >= 10), with low-support count=0 (none).
transfer_scope_text: Transfer-scope claim is bounded to the evaluated cross-year independent-harbor set: coverage=3 regions, negative-DeltaF1 pairs=1/6.
threshold_policy_text: Operator-threshold policy is locked per region by minimum mean regret over predefined cost profiles (balanced, fn_heavy, fn_very_heavy, fp_heavy). The selected profile and threshold statistics are frozen in the operator-profile lock table.
caption_addendum_text: Caption addendum: Recommended models show lower calibration error in 3/3 datasets and higher F1 with non-overlapping 95% CI in 1/3 datasets; see significance appendix (/Users/seoki/Desktop/research/docs/significance_report_2026-04-04_expanded_models_10seed.csv).
model_claim_caveat_text: Reviewer caveat: Main-text model claims are restricted to recommended models that satisfy calibration (ECE<=0.10) and seed-variance (F1 std<=0.03) gates; models failing either gate are retained in appendix-only ablation tables.
